title: note/comment default size
author: emg-py
body:
Hello,
When using the 'note/comment' method, informations are displayed in a default/small size window. All the intented content cannot be read.
I have tried to modify the transmitted string, make use of the 'rich text' format... With no result.

Is there a mean to adapt the size of the 'note' window to the content of a multiline string ?
Am I missing something ?

Many thanks,

comments.author: cerinoligutom
comments.body: Up. Need this as well. The default size is too small.

comments.author: mllrdev-miguelsobong
comments.body: Up. I have some use cases for this too.

comments.author: eminenceit
comments.body: any update on this issue please? This is an important feature!

comments.author: hyjiacan
avnerI
comments.body:
> PR #1933 !
> 
> I make an external change to resolve this issue. Just modify the ouput.
> 
> Information:
> 
> The styles of comments store in file _xl/drawings/vmlDrawing2.vml_
> 
> Replace all occued text `<v:textbox style="mso-direction-alt:auto"` with `<v:textbox style="mso-direction-alt:auto;mso-fit-shape-to-text:t"`, will makes it right.
> 
> Here is my function:
> 
> ```js
> async function fixCommentStyle(buffer) {
>   const zip = await JSZip.loadAsync(buffer)
>   const vmlDrawing2FileName = 'xl/drawings/vmlDrawing2.vml'
>   // Get the style file
>   const vmlDrawing2 = zip.file(vmlDrawing2FileName)
>   if (!vmlDrawing2) {
>     // eslint-disable-next-line
>     console.warn(`Cannot find ${vmlDrawing2FileName}`)
>     return buffer
>   }
>   // Get content as string
>   const xml = await vmlDrawing2.async('string')
>   
>   const placeholder = '<v:textbox style="mso-direction-alt:auto;mso-fit-shape-to-text:t"'
>   const newXml = xml.replace(/<v:textbox style="mso-direction-alt:auto"/g, placeholder)
>   // Write back to the file
>   zip.file(vmlDrawing2FileName, newXml)
>   return await zip.generateAsync({type: 'arraybuffer'})
> }
> ```
> 
> The `buffer` object comes from `workbook.writebuffer`.
> 
> Note: Once the PR #1933 merged, we can just remove the invocation on this function.

I had to use `xl/drawings/vmlDrawing1.vml`
and to export the edited file: 

`return zip.generateNodeStream();`

But it woks (strange a bit on mac installed excel app - but that's Microsoft's problem)

comments.author: kaydream
comments.body: ok thanks to hyjiacan i done this with change in exceljs source from dist folder and change mso-direction-alt:auto to mso-direction-alt:auto;mso-fit-shape-to-text:t in all files instead of change buffer every time in my program
